subject: Suggested VibecodingHub feature: Ralph Workflow
why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is flat, so the loop should prefer fresh curator/backlink lanes over more owned content.
distribution_lane_latest.json already points to curator contact handoff as the current execution lane.
VibecodingHub is a fresh, highly aligned coding-tool curator not present in outreach-log.md or prior execution logs.
The site explicitly accepts project suggestions by email, which makes this an executable lane from the current runtime.
expected_outcome: Qualified coding-tool evaluators reach Ralph Workflow through a new third-party curator surface with Codeberg as the primary repo destination.
replacement_condition: If there is no response or listing evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this lane as pending only and shift the next curator action toward another fresh coding-tool curator with a direct executable contact surface.
